author: lecheenax
description: Track time, edits, word changes & AI change/diff summary per note automatically. Show live stats in status bar & sidebar (Heatmap view). Record to daily note (periodic notes) as table/list/YAML).

manifest.author: LeCheenaX
manifest.description: Track the changes and stats of your edited note files automatically. Record the modified notes and statistics to your daily note with various customizations!
manifest.name: Wordflow Tracker

name: Wordflow Tracker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- Modified Note Recorder can now configure its own date format. 

🐛 **Bug Fixes:**
- Fixed recorder setting toggle buttons so clicking most of the button area no longer collapses the recorder unexpectedly.
- Fixed Widget settings page scrolling so settings after "Switch to this field" remain reachable.

⚡ **Enhancements:**
- ES-Lint issues as per Obsidian specifications. 

🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- Added three-column titles in recorder settings to clarify what each column represents.
- Refined the add button in recorder settings so the plus icon no longer occupies a full-row background.
- Improved recorder settings layout on mobile, including the right margin and crowded five-column controls for name, note type, content type, enable, and delete.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### 2.3.0 updates #### 🔥 **Major Updates:** - Rebuilt recorder settings UI: new Property Editor, folder suggestions, and improved interaction logic for more convenient configuration experience. - new recorder setting styles: - property editor for table syntax: - property editor for list syntax: - **New recorder type: Modified Note Recorder** [#17]— directly record accumulated historic edit stats into each modified note itself, ideal for tracking per-note writing progress over time. - Supports metadata, bullet list, and scope folder filtering. #### ✨ **New Features:** - New Property Editor in recorder settings for structured syntax editing. - Folder auto-suggestions when configuring periodic note folders. ⚡ **Enhancements:** - Optimized default settings for better out-of-box experience. - Improved i18n and tooltips for newly added features. 🐛 **Bug Fixed:** - Fixed document word count being incorrect due to tracker not updating original words.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- Context Management: AI can now understand changes better by:
    - Document summary: AI can generate a document summary when first indexing a note, providing better understanding of the overall document structure.
    - Document Headings: Heading tree structure can be included with AI requests for better document organization awareness.
    - File chunking: including surrounding context (sentences, paragraphs, or heading sections) around modified areas.

🎨 **UI Optimization**:
- Reorganized AI settings page: added dedicated "Context Management" section and "Advanced" section for clearer configuration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Widget view may appear at an unexpected location when the plugin is re-enabled. 

⚡ **Enhancements:**
- Fixed ES-Lint issues as per Obsidian regulation.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ New Features:
- File colors under the same tag are easier to distinguish by controling the range slider.

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Note properties with hyphens \`modified-date\` is not recognized by the recorder. 
- Field Alias not recognize data fields from other recorders.

🎨 UI Optimization:
- Clarified widget settings for easier understanding
- Files under one tag will be easier to distinguish

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- AI diff request was sent even when there were no edits to the note.
- Timed-out or failed AI diff requests left a stale loading icon permanently in periodic notes.

🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- Improved font size adaptation to the width of the widget view.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- Auto update link alias to the latest file name after the note is renamed.

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Modified data may be recorded to the wrong date after syncking from the other device.
- Widget not update when detected crossday.
- Links in table of dailynote may be broken by Obsidian. 
- Hover style issue on recorder switcher and field switcher in widget.

⚡ **Enhancements:**
- If links are broken due to Obsidian or any reasons, the plugin will auto fix the broken links (only effective for links generated by this plugin in periodic notes).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- CSS standardization according to Obsidian specifications.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- AI Diff Summary could now using line-breaks by default. 

⚡ **Enhancements:**
- Removed unnecessary \`!important\` declarations in CSS by increasing selector specificity.
- Fixed duplicate CSS selector in widget settings.
- Replaced deprecated \`builtin-modules\` package with Node.js native \`node:module\`.
- Optimized tag retrieval: replaced vault file enumeration with \`metadataCache.getTags()\` for O(1) performance.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- Improved Heatmap color gradient generation logic.

⚡ **Enhancements:**
- Refactored core code structure for better maintainability and performance.
- Optimized Widget property retrieval logic.
- Enhanced i18n content processing.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Syntax change only updated today's note: now scans the entire folder for all periodic notes matching the format and containing data in the old syntax, and updates them all.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- AI Diff Summary: Automatically generate a summary of note changes using LLM integration.
    - BYOK: Bring Your Own Key. You can use your own OpenAI API key to call LLM.

![example](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fc2e58f8-0a91-4faa-8d62-ab2b23cb72e3)

>[!Caution]
> If enabled this feature, an temporary index file will be created in \`.obsidian/\` folder, which can be syncronized by Obsidian or third party services。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- Option to show and rank note properties. 
   - To show note properties of each note recorded in daily note: use \`\${property.propertyName}\` in the table syntax. For example: \`\${property.tags}\` will list all tags for each note. 
   - To rank note properties, the property type must be numbers. You can set alias for the note property in widget settings, and drop out the available properties in the widget. 

🐛 **Bugs Fixed:**
- Unability to count the edited words accurately in markdown table([issue #14](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/14)).
- Data racing issue when current data is updated in widget.
- Notes are not recorded when focused time is enough.
- Heatmap view sometimes may not be updated.
- Widget View frequently refreshing while editing the documents.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
- Option to ignore warnings: You can now choose to hide warning messages in settings for a cleaner experience.
- Heatmap view improvements:
    - Change time range: Select different time periods to view in the heatmap.
    - Smart cell sizing: Heatmap cells now automatically adjust to fit your sidebar width perfectly.
    - Week start day customization: Choose which day your week starts on in the heatmap view (Sunday or Monday).

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Resolved a rare case where document word count could show negative values ([issue #14](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/14)).
- Widget view now updates correctly on first launch when the plugin view is attached to the workspace.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 2.0.0 updates

>[!caution]
>Weekly note, monthly note users should be careful:
>- if the periodic note title format is not a safe usecase of \`moment.js\`, you will be prompted to change title format or revert to 1.7.x version.
>- you should assign a property to mark your recorder as non-daily-note for best compatibility
>	- this feature is introduced in 2.0.0, in plugin settings > recorders > periodic note to record > periodic note type.

>[!important]
>Thanks for the companion and feedbacks in the previous 33 versions of this plugin since 1.0.0. In the future, this plugin will mainly focus on the following functions:
>1. **data analysis** and **periodic summary**
>2. **AI integration**
>
>Any idea or new notion will be warm welcomed by [raising an issue](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues). You can also fetch the upcoming features in [developing roadmap](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/wiki/Development-RoadMap).
>
>If you enjoy WordFlow Tracker, please consider giving it a star ⭐ on GitHub. 
> Your support is the greatest encouragement for me to keep improving this plugin.  
>👉 [Star WordFlow Tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker)
>
>— _LeCheenaX_  
>Thank you for being part of this journey! 🙏

🚀 **Key Insights:**
- New view: heatmap view is available for daily note recorder
- UI and control panel is completely reworked:
    - add view switch button with three modes (file list, tag list, heatmap)
    - add note navigation support for reviewing previous data
    - recorder switching panel is moved to the top of the widget
- Depreciated: \`enable tag-based view\` is replaced by \`default view on open\` in widget settings.

🔥 **Major Updates:**
- Heatmap view: *available for daily note recorder only*
    - Custom color and gradient levels is supported
    - dynamically adapt gradient thresholds to different properties based on existing data in daily notes, which ensures the note will be distributed on all levels for better visual hierarchy
        - hover on the legend to show detailed range
    - consistent behaviors from Obsidian: 
        - click the cell to open note
        - press ctrl + click on cell to open in new tab
        - press ctrl and hover on cell to preview daily note content
- Navigate panel: 
    - hidden by default, hover on the date in widget to show up
    - mark label based on date: today, yesterday, this week, last week, etc.
    - consistent behaviors from Obsidian: 
        - click the cell to open note
        - press ctrl + click on cell to open in new tab

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- No information is displayed is selected field has data but all data is zero

⚡️ **Enhancements:**
- Decoupling the function \`getOrCreateRecordNote\` into separate functions
- Improve folder creation logic with better error handling and validation
- Complete missing notification messages translations
- Error notifications will inform which note has issues

🎨 **UI Reworked:**
- New style for dropdown component
- Switching note support with navigation buttons

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ### 1.7.5 updates ✨ **New Features:** - Preview the result of recording syntax. - Prompt to adapt the existing record to recording syntax after changing.Previews are also supported. 🐛 **Bug Fixed:** - Recorders not auto update to Widget after changes. ⚡️ **Enhancements:** - Ensure the tracker is reset after recording completes. - Handle the cross-day editing correctly when multiple notes are edited simultaneously.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 1.7.4 updates
🔥 **Key Insight:**
- The newly generated links will now obey the Obsidian new link format settings(one of shortest, relative path, absolute path), rather than vault absolute path.

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Warning messages will repeat too many times in the notification ([Issue 12](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/12)).
- The plugin could not recognize links updated by Obsidian correctly. 

⚡️ **Enhancements:**
- Rebuilt the renaming and migration logics, to ensure the parsing works for links edited either by Obsdian or by user.
- Safeguarding the parsing logics for deleted files. 

✨ **New Features:**
- Option to auto clear the records for deleted files.

🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- File name will ellipse correctly in tag based view. 
- Files with no tag, which has a configured color, will have coordinate style with other files.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Race condition issues while recording [Issue 11](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/11).
- Widget silently collapses when data is corrupted by unexpected file rename or migration.

⚡️ **Enhancements:**
- Safeguarding the color updating mechanism to prevent racing issues.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ **New Features:**
-  Custom tag group labels (optional)

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Setting validation is incorrect.
- Widget timing will unexpectedly display seconds.

🎨 **UI Optimization:**
- Uniform font styles in the tag based view.
- Correcting setting styling when width is not enough.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐛 **Bug Fixed:**

🎨 **UI Optimization:**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🔥 **Major Updates:**
- Tag-based colors. Instead of randomly generated colors for file displaying in the widget, supports custom colors based on the file tags. 
- Tag-based data View: Hierarchical list view with collapsible tag groups and dual-layer progress bar for better data organization.

✨ **New Features:**
- Option to automatically resume focus mode after idle pause

🐛 **Bug Fixed:**
- Metadata of the notes may sometimes be duplicated in YAML frontmatter
- Status bar occasionally displaying incorrect content in reading mode
- Fixed settings page auto-closing when plugin is disabled while widget view is active

⚡️ **Enhancements:**
- Improved YAML frontmatter handling using Obsidian's metadataCache API for more reliable metadata operations
- Optimized plugin loading & unloading process to prevent UI conflicts

🎨 **UI Optimization:** 
- Realigned the setting pages for clarity.
- More tooltips and hover behaviors.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- Quick Reference: In the setting page, offer quick reference to essential plugin documentation and string interpolation reference.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

1. Fixed \${docWords} not working properly for status bar tracker

**Enhancements:**

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 1.5.3 updates
**New Feature:**
- Option to exclude folders or file tags from being tracked by this plugin, thanks to [@Myrte46](https://github.com/Myrte46).

**Bug Fixed:**
1. The \${docWords} property may be updated by other note.
2. The totalValue in the sidebar widget may not update, if the widget is not updated on today but on the next day.
3. The false positive console error by Obsidian due to the async initialization. This does not affect the usage but just pollute the console logs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
1. The \${statBar} property may be incorrect, which overrides the existing data with new data.
2. Widget view may not initialize properly, if the plugin is set to load with delay(by 3rd party plugin manager plugin) after Obsidian load.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
1. MetaData will not update the following properties in 1.5.0:
    1. totalReadTime
    2. totalTime
2. **The records on yesterday or earlier will be wrongly recorded on today's note**, if Obsidian is opened up to the next day. 
3. Console log pollution in beta version 1.5.0.
4. Changed log **version display** is not correct. 

Including all features in the beta version 1.5.0: 
>**New Features:**
>1. Side pane widget to display timer and other stats.
>2. New interpolation expressions:
>   1. ${readTime} to record reading time per note 
>    2. ${readEditTime} to combine reading time + editing time per note
>   3. ${totalReadTime} for total reading time from all notes
>    4. ${totalTime} to combine reading total time + editing total time from all notes
>3. Focus mode that could be controled by the widget:
>    1. when entering focus mode, the reading time will be recorded, this will accumulate the new fields ${readTime} and ${readEditTime}. 
>    2. when focused, the docTracker will no longer be deactivated when you click elsewhere of Obsidian.
>    3. when focused, the docTracker will not be really deactivated when mode switched. Instead, it will switch mode to either track editing or track reading.
>    4. when pausing from focused, the reading timer will be paused, while the editing timer will still function to accumulate ${editTime} and ${readEditTime}.
>    5. when quiting focus mode, the statistics of notes will be recorded to periodic notes.
>4. Open files in current tab or in new tab by clicking file entries in the Widget. 
>5. Display seconds for the timer in the widget. 
>    note: Technically, this could be applied to status bar, existing data in periodic note. However, this is restricted to the timer in widget in this version, as this introduces multiple undefined issues otherwise. 
>
>Rebuilt: 
>- EditTimer is rebuilt into Timer, with capability of mode detecting.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New Features:**
1. Side pane widget to display timer and other stats.
2. New interpolation expressions:
    1. ${readTime} to record reading time per note 
    2. ${readEditTime} to combine reading time + editing time per note
    3. ${totalReadTime} for total reading time from all notes
    4. ${totalTime} to combine reading total time + editing total time from all notes
3. Focus mode that could be controled by the widget:
    1. when entering focus mode, the reading time will be recorded, this will accumulate the new fields ${readTime} and ${readEditTime}. 
    2. when focused, the docTracker will no longer be deactivated when you click elsewhere of Obsidian.
    3. when focused, the docTracker will not be really deactivated when mode switched. Instead, it will switch mode to either track editing or track reading.
    4. when pausing from focused, the reading timer will be paused, while the editing timer will still function to accumulate ${editTime} and ${readEditTime}.
    5. when quiting focus mode, the statistics of notes will be recorded to periodic notes.
4. Open files in current tab or in new tab by clicking file entries in the Widget. 
5. Display seconds for the timer in the widget. 
    note: Technically, this could be applied to status bar, existing data in periodic note. However, this is restricted to the timer in widget in this version, as this introduces multiple undefined issues otherwise. 

Rebuilt: 
- EditTimer is rebuilt into Timer, with capability of mode detecting.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
1. The YAML recorder may unexpectedly add an empty line to the YAML.
2. The empty comment may be ignored by the table parser, leading to the column after the comment be extracted instead.
3. The noteThredhold not working when using command, ribbon button, or auto recording interval timed out.

**Feature:**
- Support core plugin "Templates" when creating periodic note. (fixes [issue 5](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/5))
- Reviewing changelogs when updates the plugin. 

**Enhancements:**
- New Settings with preview feature and validation check!

**Rebuilt:**
- Settings page are rebuilt to preview user input at real time, and validate legal inputs.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
- (Emergent fix) **The rebuilt logic could now record other notes in edit mode correctly**.
- Require none option is no longer flawed, now it can trigger the correct recording only when mode switched, and no longer trigger recording on active leaf change.
- Mode switch checking returns false if the note is in edit mode when enabling the plugin, after which is switched to reading mode.


**New features:**
- Option to choose whether auto record other notes in edit mode when quiting editing mode.
- Option to control status bar on mobile device.

**Enhancement:**
- Safer mode-switch checking

**Rebuilt:**
- Recording logics, now will only trigger recording on mode switch, and no longer triggers recording on active leaf change.
- Function `getAllOpenedFiles()` will now return the mode of last active view, if the same file is opened in multiple tabs and the modes of tabs are different

Review Changes in [1.4.1](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/releases/tag/1.4.1):
> **Bug Fixed:**
>Status bar will update as expected if switched mode twice in a second, while maintain the ability added in 1.3.1 to update as expected when edit sth and immediately open a new note.
>Updates from prev-1.4.0 versions will now have no influence if not using new features. In 1.4.0, users may have to tolerate potential bugs from new features.
>
> **Rebuilt:**
>Rebuilt the filter notes to record behavior, now we use mode switch rather than toggle button to control.
>No longer frequently create docTracker when switching mode, now only do this when new note opens. This is for the 1.5 version to record focused time under reading mode.
>The getAllOpenedFiles function will now get mode of current file
>
>**Caution:**
>The new option: require none in notesToRecord is flawed: It should not trigger recording when active leaf changes but current view is reading mode (brought by getAllOpenedFiles rebuilding)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
- Status bar will update as expected if switched mode twice in a second, while maintain the ability added in 1.3.1 to update as expected when edit sth and immediately open a new note.
- Updates from prev-1.4.0 versions will now have no influence if not using new features. In 1.4.0, users may have to tolerate potential bugs from new features. 

**Rebuilt:**
- Rebuilt the filter notes to record behavior, now we use mode switch rather than toggle button to control.
- No longer frequently create docTracker when switching mode, now only do this when new note opens. This is for the 1.5 version to record focused time under reading mode. 
- The getAllOpenedFiles function will now get mode of current file

**Caution:**
- The new option: **require none** in notesToRecord is flawed: It should not trigger recording when active leaf changes but current view is reading mode (brought by getAllOpenedFiles rebuilding)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features
### Focused editing time (Archives [issue 2](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/2)).
The focused editing time will trigger whenever you are on **editing mode** of a note. However, if idled for few moments, the timer will automatically pause. 
- if you do not modify the note, or click the document for 3 minutes by default, the timer will idle and auto pause.
- you can click the note to revoke the timer.
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/51ce15a6-a935-46c2-9676-5525bd6b092f)

This feature is tied with following supported features:
- **sorting by** editTime property
- recording **total editing time** of all notes
- **custom idle time**
- clicking the document to revoke the timer.
- clicking the **outline** to revoke the timer.

### Note Title (Archives [issue 4](https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/issues/4))
- Finally comming out the note title instead of note path for your reviewing. 
Instead of this:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cb2dbffe-e070-41fa-9cc5-3855ac435868)
Now we can show the note title only:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6c977b5f-0aba-4481-847b-f0fda6c5cd98)

### Comment
- Custom comment on the entries recorded by the recorder is now supported! 
- You can now add anything to note what have you done on this note
- Try by adding a new column with a custom name and ${comment} in recording syntax

## Enhancements
**Improved:** 
- Rebuilt the setting page to be more organized and for updcoming new features in v1.5.
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2b48c3d8-3ada-46e8-b735-21d14e87a188)

- Optimized mobile status bar


**Bug Fixed:**
- Extra emptylines will be created under bullet list
- Edit time will no longer return a timestamp (means you start editing from 1970-01-01)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug Fixed:**
- Fix the bug that the word counting will be larger than expected.

**Enhancement:**
- Imported the same word counting method of Obsidian.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fixes:**
- Failed to create note in root folder when the periodic note folders are different in multiple recorders. 
- **Recorded data are different** in some cases. e.g. Metadata is recorded, but the table or bullet list recorder is not correctly recorded. 
- **Duplicate metadata records** by closing multiple tabs of the same note when periodic note does not exist.
- **Delayed display** in status bar, or the status bar not updating when switching to new notes.

**Enhancements:**
- **The data of trackers will be backed up to the console when not recording correctly**.
- No longer call recorders for notes without edits, when enabled filter out non-edited notes in settings.
- Unbind resources after deactivating in case of possible memory leak.
- Error notice in Obsidian will no longer disappear without user-clicking.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements:**
1. Automatically create periodic note folder of not exist
2. Clearer setting descriptions
3. Add prompt when edits from single note are recorded.

**New Feature:**
- Option to enable dynamic periodic note folder

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bugs fixed:**
1. Fixed the bug that the modified time won't be recognized when timeFormat doesn't contain 'YYYY-MM-DD', for example, using 'HH:mm'.
2. Fixed the bug that table parser could not fetch the correct modified Time from existing data.
3. Fixed the bug that WordsCounter function will treat "Let's" as 2 words, rather than 1 word.
4. Fixed the bug that the wordsCt function are unexpectedly created for multiple times, leading to the wrong counting of modified words.
5. Status bar won't update when first time opening a new note but switched elsewhere quickly.
6. Status bar won't update when not focusing on note but the recorder is triggered by automatic recording or the button.
7. The data entries are merged before newData entries are completely loaded.

**Rebuilt:** 
1. The extractData() function and getIndex() function by introducing Obsidian MetadataCache API for MetaDataParser.
2. Other function arguments and member variables as necessary structure before introducing new API.
3. The extractData() function of TableParser.
4. Migrating the function to extract data from given table from ExistingData class to TableParser.

**Improvements:**
- Shrink the DocTracker delay for getting the data. As the needed delay is implemented before calling DocTracker during the updates.

**Adjustments:** 
1. Deleted the funding url as I don't need it at the point.
2. Change "Rename Recorder" to "Rename recorder" to implement the sentence case.
4. Deleted the word "setting" from the setting name, current name is: "Recording contents".
6. Deleted the word "option" from the setting name, current name is: "Recording miscellaneous".
7. Replace the unfavorred 'h3' heading creation with the 'new Setting()' implementation. Using styles.css to implement desired styles. 
8. Importing 'moment' from Obsidian package rather than from other package.

**Changes from withdrawed 1.2.0+ versions:**
> Bug fixed:
> 1. The daily note folder not function when nested for more than one folder.
> 2. Table could not recognize the end line when recording.
> 
> New Feature:
> - Multiple recorders are now supported!
>
> - You can now record your edit stats to metadata, table between your titles, list between your titles at the same time!
> - You can also record data to both your daily note and your weekly note (and perhaps monthly note :) )
> 
> Rebuild:
> - The setting page are now more colorful and clear!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LeCheenaX/WordFlow-Tracker/compare/1.1.1...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fixed:** 
- The daily note folder not function when nested for more than one folder. 

**Changes from 1.2.0:** 
> New Feature:
> Multiple recorders are now supported!
> 
> You can now record your edit stats to metadata, table between your titles, list between your titles at the same time!
> You can also record data to both your daily note and your weekly note (and perhaps monthly note :) )
> Rebuild:
> The setting page are now more colorful and clear!
> 
> Bug Fixed:
> Table could not recognize the end line when recording.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New Feature:**
Multiple recorders are now supported! 
- You can now record your edit stats to metadata, table between your titles, list between your titles at the same time! 
- You can also record data to both your daily note and your weekly note (and perhaps monthly note :) )

**Rebuild:**
The setting page are now more colorful and clear! 

**Bug Fixed:**
Table could not recognize the end line when recording.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
New Feature: 
- Insert to YAML with metadata syntax.

Enhancement:
- Improve setting page for handling the metadata feature safely.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Rebuild: 

- Separate some member functions from DataRecorder into new classes. They can focus on their unique jobs and make the function of DataRecorder clearer.

New Features:

1. Customization of places where the edit stats will be recorded. 
2. Option to filter out recording notes with 0 edit.
3. Option to restore to default settings. 

Enhancements: 

- Add interruption method in case daily note is unexpectedly replaced.

Bug Fixed: 

- The wrongly identified table end index may lead to the replacement of all contents after the table starting line.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Changing icon and improving command descriptions.

- Fixed version issue in manifest.xml 

## Major changes from 1.0.4
> Bug Fixed:
Settings are not updated immediately after changing unless reload plugin.
Improvements:
Introduce normalize path in case of unintended wrong input paths.
New Notice to inform the periodic note is created if periodic note does not exist.
Use vault.process instead of vault.modify to replace previous recorded contents.
This supports safe recording even when you are editing the periodic note where the edit stats are to record.
Enhancement:
Using github workflows to automatically compile main.js and publish releases.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Bug Fixed:

- Settings are not updated immediately after changing unless reload plugin.

### Improvements:

1. Introduce normalize path in case of unintended wrong input paths.
2. New Notice to inform the periodic note is created if periodic note does not exist. 
3. Use vault.process instead of vault.modify to replace previous recorded contents.  
   This supports safe recording even when you are editing the periodic note where the edit stats are to record.

### Enhancement:

- Using github workflows to automatically compile main.js and publish releases.

releases.author: LeCheenaX
releases.description:
Bug Fixed:
- Bullet list mode is now supported without observable issues.
- Changing list-style settings will get back to the default option after reloading.

releases.author: LeCheenaX
releases.description:
Bug Fixed:
1. Could not detect existing table record, when Obsidian automatically formated table by omitting/increaing spaces in table header or '-' in table separator.
2. Inaccurate modified time
3. Incorrect lineBreak counting when recording to note.
4. Not reset the tracker of document when recorded.
5. The recorder may record multiple times of the same result. 

Rebuilding: 
- Rebuilding the recorder function to DataRecorder class, as OOP could allow multiple recorders as a planned feature.

New Feature: 
- Support record single document automatically when doc is closed. (with little bug that sometimes it will not record)
- Support disabling the automatical recorder by setting it to 0

releases.author: LeCheenaX
releases.description:
Adjustments:
1. remove things from the sample plugin that don't need.
2. rename the sample classes to something that makes sense to this plugin
3. migrate setting styles to styles.css
4. removing the number of console.logs in source code
5. other tiny adjustments. 

New:
- Added the feature of get potential editors to make the experience smoother.

Rebuild:
1. Updating trackerMap from file names to file paths. 
2. Updating logic of deleting trackerMap entries and deactivating idle editors.

Bug fixes:
- Fixed the severe bug: As active Editor will be delayed to update(restricted by Obsidian structrue), this will cause the activeDocHandler receiving the wrong activeEditor. However, adding delay directly will prevent fast recording when switching between 2 files in less than 50ms. Thus, add separated delaying logics to ensure all cases are working fine.


This should be the final version of DocTracker workflow. (Though one tiny bug is allowed, as it will do no harm to the feature but has much better performance than rebuilding it with a bugless version)

releases.author: LeCheenaX
releases.description:
The first version of runable plugin comes out! 
> All statics are fetched by diectly reading the Obsidian data, without adding additional thread to record the data, which means that enabling the recording will bring almost no performance loss or extra RAM occupation.

Kindly share any opinions on this plugin in issues!
